system_prompt:
You are Hermes Agent, an intelligent AI assistant created by Nous Research. You are helpful, knowledgeable, and direct. You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

Conversation started: Saturday, April 04, 2026 03:25 PM
Model: claude-opus-4-6
Provider: anthropic

You are on a text messaging communication platform, Telegram. Please do not use markdown as it does not render. You can send media files natively: to deliver a file to the user, include MEDIA:/absolute/path/to/file in your response. Images (.png, .jpg, .webp) appear as photos, audio (.ogg) sends as voice bubbles, and videos (.mp4) play inline. You can also include image URLs in markdown format ![alt](url) and they will be sent as native photos.

function.name: patch
function.description:
Targeted find-and-replace edits in files. Use this instead of sed/awk in terminal. Uses fuzzy matching (9 strategies) so minor whitespace/indentation differences won't break it. Returns a unified diff. Auto-runs syntax checks after editing.

Replace mode (default): find a unique string and replace it.
Patch mode: apply V4A multi-file patches for bulk changes.

mode.description: Edit mode: 'replace' for targeted find-and-replace, 'patch' for V4A multi-file patches

path.description: File path to edit (required for 'replace' mode)

old_string.description: Text to find in the file (required for 'replace' mode). Must be unique in the file unless replace_all=true. Include enough surrounding context to ensure uniqueness.

new_string.description: Replacement text (required for 'replace' mode). Can be empty string to delete the matched text.

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences instead of requiring a unique match (default: false)

patch.description:
V4A format patch content (required for 'patch' mode). Format:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: path/to/file
@@ context hint @@
 context line
-removed line
+added line
*** End Patch

function.name: process
function.description: Manage background processes started with terminal(background=true). Actions: 'list' (show all), 'poll' (check status + new output), 'log' (full output with pagination), 'wait' (block until done or timeout), 'kill' (terminate), 'write' (send raw stdin data without newline), 'submit' (send data + Enter, for answering prompts).

action.description: Action to perform on background processes

session_id.description: Process session ID (from terminal background output). Required for all actions except 'list'.

data.description: Text to send to process stdin (for 'write' and 'submit' actions)

timeout.description: Max seconds to block for 'wait' action. Returns partial output on timeout.

offset.description: Line offset for 'log' action (default: last 200 lines)

limit.description: Max lines to return for 'log' action

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read a text file with line numbers and pagination. Use this instead of cat/head/tail in terminal. Output format: 'LINE_NUM|CONTENT'. Suggests similar filenames if not found. Use offset and limit for large files. Reads exceeding ~100K characters are rejected; use offset and limit to read specific sections of large files. NOTE: Cannot read images or binary files — use vision_analyze for images.

path.description: Path to the file to read (absolute, relative, or ~/path)

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-indexed, default: 1)

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read (default: 500, max: 2000)

function.name: search_files
function.description:
Search file contents or find files by name. Use this instead of grep/rg/find/ls in terminal. Ripgrep-backed, faster than shell equivalents.

Content search (target='content'): Regex search inside files. Output modes: full matches with line numbers, file paths only, or match counts.

File search (target='files'): Find files by glob pattern (e.g., '*.py', '*config*'). Also use this instead of ls — results sorted by modification time.

pattern.description: Regex pattern for content search, or glob pattern (e.g., '*.py') for file search

target.description: 'content' searches inside file contents, 'files' searches for files by name

path.description: Directory or file to search in (default: current working directory)

file_glob.description: Filter files by pattern in grep mode (e.g., '*.py' to only search Python files)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50)

offset.description: Skip first N results for pagination (default: 0)

output_mode.description: Output format for grep mode: 'content' shows matching lines with line numbers, 'files_only' lists file paths, 'count' shows match counts per file

context.description: Number of context lines before and after each match (grep mode only)

function.name: terminal
function.description:
Execute shell commands on a Linux environment. Filesystem usually persists between calls.

Do NOT use cat/head/tail to read files — use read_file instead.
Do NOT use grep/rg/find to search — use search_files instead.
Do NOT use ls to list directories — use search_files(target='files') instead.
Do NOT use sed/awk to edit files — use patch instead.
Do NOT use echo/cat heredoc to create files — use write_file instead.
Reserve terminal for: builds, installs, git, processes, scripts, network, package managers, and anything that needs a shell.

Foreground (default): Commands return INSTANTLY when done, even if the timeout is high. Set timeout=300 for long builds/scripts — you'll still get the result in seconds if it's fast. Prefer foreground for everything that finishes.
Background: ONLY for long-running servers, watchers, or processes that never exit. Set background=true to get a session_id, then use process(action="wait") to block until done — it returns instantly on completion, same as foreground. Use process(action="poll") only when you need a progress check without blocking.
Do NOT use background for scripts, builds, or installs — foreground with a generous timeout is always better (fewer tool calls, instant results).
Working directory: Use 'workdir' for per-command cwd.
PTY mode: Set pty=true for interactive CLI tools (Codex, Claude Code, Python REPL).

Do NOT use vim/nano/interactive tools without pty=true — they hang without a pseudo-terminal. Pipe git output to cat if it might page.
Important: cloud sandboxes may be cleaned up, idled out, or recreated between turns. Persistent filesystem means files can resume later; it does NOT guarantee a continuously running machine or surviving background processes. Use terminal sandboxes for task work, not durable hosting.

command.description: The command to execute on the VM

background.description: ONLY for servers/watchers that never exit. For scripts, builds, installs — use foreground with timeout instead (it returns instantly when done).

timeout.description: Max seconds to wait (default: 180). Returns INSTANTLY when command finishes — set high for long tasks, you won't wait unnecessarily.

workdir.description: Working directory for this command (absolute path). Defaults to the session working directory.

check_interval.description: Seconds between automatic status checks for background processes (gateway/messaging only, minimum 30). When set, I'll proactively report progress.

pty.description: Run in pseudo-terminal (PTY) mode for interactive CLI tools like Codex, Claude Code, or Python REPL. Only works with local and SSH backends. Default: false.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write content to a file, completely replacing existing content. Use this instead of echo/cat heredoc in terminal. Creates parent directories automatically. OVERWRITES the entire file — use 'patch' for targeted edits.

path.description: Path to the file to write (will be created if it doesn't exist, overwritten if it does)

content.description: Complete content to write to the file

messages.content: Refactor the Fun4Me Store (Next.js 15 adult e-commerce site) to remove ALL emojis and add real images. The store is at /root/fun4me-store. ## Task 1: Create image constants file Create /root/fun4me-store/src/lib/images.ts with curated Unsplash image URLs for categories, kinks, and placeholders. Use this format for Unsplash direct URLs: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-XXXXXXXXX?w=WIDTH&h=HEIGHT&fit=crop Use TASTEFUL, ABSTRACT, and SUGGESTIVE-BUT-NOT-EXPLICIT images. These are for an adult products store in Paraguay. Pick photos of: silk/satin textures, abstract body curves, candles/ambiance, lingerie flat-lays, soft lighting scenes, etc. ```typescript // /root/fun4me-store/src/lib/images.ts // Category images (square, used in category grid cards) export const CATEGORY_IMAGES: Record = { vibradores: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]bfdc403348?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // pink/purple abstract consoladores: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]e090bd0f1?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // purple abstract art anal: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]-d3d4b5a92ead?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // abstract gradient 'para-el': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]bda4d32df4?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // masculine blue abstract 'para-parejas': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]cd7833ae3b2?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // couple silhouette lenceria: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]c088753af8f?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // silk fabric texture lubricantes: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]-efcbd6e3f031?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // water drops abstract 'bienestar-sexual': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]ab6ce6db874?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // wellness/spa candles }; // Kink category images export const KINK_IMAGES: Record = { bondage: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]c80973a0b?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // rope/knots impacto: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]d9dca6d1e43?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // leather texture 'dominacion-sumision': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]-dc8bd696e667?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // dark moody sensaciones: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]a1dd7228f2d?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // candle flame 'privacion-sensorial': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]b95b3ab5986?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // dark abstract 'juego-de-roles': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]-e6e10975bc17?w=400&h=400&fit=crop', // masks/theater }; // Product placeholder by category (used when product has no image) export const PRODUCT_PLACEHOLDERS: Record = { vibradores: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]bfdc403348?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', consoladores: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]e090bd0f1?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', anal: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]-d3d4b5a92ead?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', 'para-el': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]bda4d32df4?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', 'para-parejas': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]cd7833ae3b2?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', lenceria: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]c088753af8f?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', lubricantes: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]-efcbd6e3f031?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', 'bienestar-sexual': 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]ab6ce6db874?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', default: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]e090bd0f1?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', }; // Hero section background export const HERO_IMAGE = 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]a1dd7228f2d?w=1200&h=600&fit=crop'; // Generic fallback export const DEFAULT_PRODUCT_IMAGE = 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[REDACTED_PHONE]e090bd0f1?w=300&h=300&fit=crop'; ``` ## Task 2: Remove ALL emojis from every component and replace with Lucide icons or images Files to edit (ALL of them): ### 1. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/page.tsx - Remove CATEGORY_EMOJIS map entirely - Import CATEGORY_IMAGES, KINK_IMAGES from '@/lib/images' - Import Next.js Image component - Category cards: replace `{cat.emoji || CATEGORY_EMOJIS[cat.slug] || '📦'}` with an `` using CATEGORY_IMAGES[cat.slug] - Hero buttons: remove 🛍️ and 💬 emojis from button text - Kink section: remove 🔥 from h2 "Explora por Kink", replace kink card emoji with `` using KINK_IMAGES - Bestsellers: remove ⭐ from "Los Más Vendidos" h2 ### 2. /root/fun4me-store/src/components/store/product-card.tsx - Remove LEVEL_BADGES emoji map - replace with colored dots using CSS (green/yellow/red circles via Tailwind) - Replace the placeholder `🛍️` with an `` tag using PRODUCT_PLACEHOLDERS based on category_slug - Import PRODUCT_PLACEHOLDERS from '@/lib/images' ### 3. /root/fun4me-store/src/components/store/trust-badges.tsx - Replace emoji badges with Lucide icons: - 📦 → Package icon - 🔒 → Lock icon - 🇵🇾 → MapPin icon (for Paraguay) - ✅ → ShieldCheck icon - Import from lucide-react ### 4. /root/fun4me-store/src/components/store/newsletter.tsx - Remove 💌 from "Recibí Ofertas Exclusivas" heading ### 5. /root/fun4me-store/src/components/store/announcement-bar.tsx - Remove 🔒 🇵🇾 ⭐ emojis, use plain text with | separators ### 6. /root/fun4me-store/src/components/store/header.tsx - Remove emoji from category dropdown: replace `{cat.emoji || '📦'}` with nothing (just show text name) ### 7. /root/fun4me-store/src/components/store/cart-drawer.tsx - Remove 🚚 and 🎉 from free shipping text - Remove 🛍️ from cart item icons - replace with a simple gradient circle with product initial letter - Remove 💬 from WhatsApp button text ### 8. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/categoria/[slug]/page.tsx - Remove emoji from h1: `{cat.emoji || '📦'} {cat.name}` → just `{cat.name}` - Remove 🔍 from empty state ### 9. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/kink/[slug]/page.tsx - Remove 🔥 from kink header - Remove 💡 from reminder text - Remove 🔍 from empty state ### 10. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/producto/[slug]/page.tsx - Remove LEVEL_BADGES emoji, use CSS colored dots instead - Replace 🛍️ product image placeholder with `` from PRODUCT_PLACEHOLDERS - Replace trust badge emojis (📦 🔒 🇵🇾 ✅) with Lucide icons - Remove ✅ from "Body Safe" badge, ❌ from "Agotado" - Remove 🧪 from material badge ### 11. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/producto/[slug]/product-actions.tsx - Remove 💬 from WhatsApp button - Remove emojis (📦 💰 🔗) from WhatsApp message template ### 12. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/producto/[slug]/product-tabs.tsx - Remove 🧼 💧 📦 ⚠️ from care instructions fallback ### 13. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/carrito/page.tsx - Remove 🚚 🎉 from shipping text - Remove 🛍️ from cart item images (use gradient with letter initial) - Remove 💬 from WhatsApp button - Remove 🎉 from free shipping text in summary - Remove 📦 🔒 from mini trust badges (use Lucide icons) ### 14. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/(store)/buscar/page.tsx - Remove 🔍 from empty state icons - use Lucide Search icon - Remove 💜 💧 👙 🎲 from category quick links ### 15. /root/fun4me-store/src/app/verificar-edad/page.tsx - Remove 🔞 emoji, replace with a simple lock/shield icon from Lucide ## IMPORTANT RULES: - NO emojis anywhere in the final code. Zero. None. - Use `` tags (not Next.js Image for external URLs, to avoid domain config issues) with proper alt text - Use Lucide React icons for UI elements (trust badges, empty states, etc.) - Keep all text in Spanish - Keep the same color scheme (rose/purple gradients) - Make sure all images have loading="lazy" and proper alt text - For product cards, show category-based placeholder images instead of emoji icons - ALL category card images should have object-cover and fill the card area nicely
I'll start by reading all the files that need to be modified, then make all the changes systematically.
